details.test: Task 1: Book 2-hour home office session under $200
Task 2: Customize Whole Home package with 3 bedrooms and add-ons

Task 4: Virtual coaching bundle with promo code TIDY10

Task 8: Select long-hours package under $600 and check Saturday morning availability
